$comment: C11/C23 6.7.10 (D-CSUBSET-STATIC-ASSERT): a file-scope `_Static_assert(sizeof(int)==4, "...")` whose condition FOLDS (via the same evaluator that folds sizeof in an array dimension) to a true value → the declaration produces nothing and the program runs (exit 42). Pins the sizeof-folding requirement end-to-end across all four targets, including the shipped release pipeline.
